description: Anonymized OCR layout families seen across OrthodoxMetrics parishes. No church names.

layouts.title: Bilingual printed ledger (book spread)
layouts.description: Pre-printed sacramental register with English and Church Slavonic headers, column grid, and numbered rows across a two-page spread.

layouts.title: Handwritten ledger — labeled fields
layouts.description: Ruled book pages with semi-structured entries using labels like NAME OF PARENTS, ADDRESS, and DATE OF BIRTH.

layouts.title: Handwritten ledger — narrative blocks
layouts.description: Ruled pages with block-style entries: SON OF / DAUGHTER OF, BORN, BAPTISM, godparents, and priest signature.

layouts.title: Parish record slip (printed form)
layouts.description: Individual baptism certificates or slips with PART 1—BAPTISMS, label-and-line fields, often photographed singly or four per image.

layouts.title: Hand-drawn baptism register grid (1930s)
layouts.description: Simple five-column hand-ruled page: child name, birth date, baptism date, parents, and sponsors in cursive rows.

layouts.title: Bilingual printed marriage ledger (book spread)
layouts.description: Pre-printed marriage register with groom/bride columns, parents, witnesses, license notes, across a two-page spread.

layouts.title: Handwritten marriage ledger — narrative
layouts.description: Ruled book with SACRAMENT OF HOLY MATRIMONY entries: groom/bride, parents, ages, residence, civil ceremony notes.

layouts.title: Parish record slip — PART II MARRIAGES
layouts.description: Printed marriage slips with groom and bride sections, witnesses, and rector signature; often photographed in batches.

layouts.title: Hand-drawn marriage register grid
layouts.description: Early ledger with hand-drawn columns; groom/bride details with vertical parent names in narrow columns.

layouts.title: Bilingual printed death ledger (book spread)
layouts.description: Pre-printed deaths register with date of death/burial, name, age, cause, priest, and interment columns.

layouts.title: Handwritten death record list
layouts.description: Ruled book with numbered entries: died/buried dates, age, cause, cemetery, and officiating priest.

layouts.title: Hand-drawn funeral register grid
layouts.description: Early six-column table: Died, Buried, Name, Cause of death, confession/communion, and officiant with burial location.

layouts.title: Two-column handwritten death list
layouts.description: Unruled page with paired columns of narrative death entries: name, age, origin, died/buried dates, cause, and cemetery.

layouts.title: Handwritten year-headed death list
layouts.description: Free-form lists grouped by year with death/burial dates at the margin and narrative entry blocks.
